prompt_outputs.saa: [Speaker 1]: This call may be recorded for quality assurance purposes. [Speaker 2]: Hello. Thank you for calling Dealer Logistics Demo dealership. How can I help you? [Speaker 3]: Yeah, hi. I just need to know what times you have available today. I'm flexible. I can come in any time. Just need something today. Can you give me the options? [Speaker 2]: We have openings this morning around 8 to 11 a.m. and early afternoon from 1 to 3 p.m. What time works best for you? [Speaker 3]: Let's do the earliest one you've got. 8 o'clock is perfect. Sorry. Can I borrow a book? Sorry. Just to confirm, 8 o'clock this morning is available, right? I want to make sure before I move on. [Speaker 2]: Got it. 8 a.m. It is. What's your name for the appointment? [Speaker 3]: Yeah, it's Mark Evans. Do you need anything else from me or is that all set? [Speaker 2]: Thanks, Mark. Do you have a vehicle with us already or should I get some details? [Speaker 3]: No, I don't have a vehicle with you yet. Do you need my car info now? Or can I just bring it in? [Speaker 2]: I'll need your car's make first to get started. What's the make? [Speaker 3]: It's a Honda. Do you need the model and year too or just the make? [Speaker 2]: I need the year and model too, please. What year is your Honda? [Speaker 3]: It's a 2021 Honda Accord. Want the VIN or is that enough? [Speaker 2]: The year and model are enough for now. What service do you need for your 2021 Honda Accord? [Speaker 3]: Just a regular oil change. Nothing else right now. That's all I need today. [Speaker 2]: Having trouble with our system. Let me transfer you to someone who can help. Just a second. I'm checking available advisors for your oil change at 8 a.m. one moment. For your oil change, would you prefer to drop off your car or wait here? [Speaker 3]: I'd rather wait here. How long does it usually take? Oil changes usually take about 30 to 45 minutes. Should I book you with Palo Advisor or anyone is fine. [Speaker 2]: Anyone is fine. Just whoever's available. I just want to get in and out quick. I'm having trouble checking times right now. Let me transfer you to someone who can help. Just a second. The earliest open slot now is 2 p.m. or 3 p.m. today. Which works better? [Speaker 3]: Oh, okay. Let's do 2 o'clock then. Please book me for 2. [Speaker 2]: To confirm, Mark, a 2021 Honda Accord oil change at 2 p.m. today, waiting here with any advisor, right? [Speaker 3]: Yes, that's right. 2 o'clock today. I'll wait here and the advisor is fine. Thanks. Is there anything else you need from me? [Speaker 2]: Let me check our system real quick for an account under this phone number. [Speaker 3]: Sure. Go ahead. Just let me know if you need anything else from me. [Speaker 2]: I'll add that to your account now. I'm adding your 2021 Honda Accord to your profile and booking your oil change at 2 p.m. today. Anything else I can help with? [Speaker 3]: Nope, that's everything. Thanks for your help. See you at 2. [Speaker 2]: Thanks for calling Dealer Logistics Demo. See you at 2 p.m. today. Bye bye.
